APPEARANCES:
Plaintiff I.N. Patel is present.
Arnold Evje representing the plaintiff.

Defendant David Bank is present.
Benjamin Cukierman representing the defendant by limited scope.

This matters comes on calendar for an Unlawful Detainer Settlement Conference. Litigants, counsel and Judge Pro Tem confer privately.

Settlement is reached, stipulation filed, trial date is off calendar.
